working_title: Audit-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Scene-Graph Parsing for Raster Floorplans
positioning: A transparent, audit-driven MoE framework for raster floorplan scene-graph parsing, emphasizing claim boundaries, opt-in policies, target-level raster evidence, and negative bottleneck diagnostics.
core_thesis: Instead of overclaiming one monolithic raster parser, the paper can contribute an auditable MoE evaluation and policy handoff framework, with limited but concrete raster target-level improvements and a clear roadmap to full scene-graph robustness.
abstract_skeleton: Problem: raster floorplan scene-graph parsing requires symbol, room, text, boundary, and relation reasoning under noisy visual evidence.
Method: build an audit-gated MoE pipeline with explicit runtime contracts, policy registries, opt-in switches, and source-integrity checks.
Evidence: symbol operating-point rebalance improves precision/F1 and reduces candidate inflation on a locked raster overlay subset; room mask-to-box repair improves image-only room extraction.
Analysis: negative results reveal image-only symbol/text bottlenecks and prevent unsafe claims.

Conclusion: the framework provides a reproducible path toward SCI-quality raster scene-graph parsing, but current evidence requires additional baselines, cross-source validation, and human-reviewed real-raster annotations before final submission.

content: Motivation for raster floorplan scene graphs
Why SVG/oracle shortcuts are invalid at runtime
Public raster supervision and image-only v15 path
Evaluation modes: target-level vs relation replay vs model-output
P095 contains relation expected-json opt-in validation
Not full end-to-end SCI2 evidence yet
Need full coverage and human-reviewed real-raster benchmark

claim_evidence_map.scope: 74-row CubiCasa locked overlay subset against public_raster_moe_supervision_v19 target boxes
claim_evidence_map.headline: p100 precision 0.188403, recall 0.681419, F1 0.295190, inflation 3.616826; vs v28 precision +0.072279/F1 +0.095458/inflation -2.525917
best handcrafted symbol peak F1 0.046862, precision 0.034493, recall 0.073062

claim_evidence_map.metric: text target-level IoU@0.30 / pixel mask F1
claim_evidence_map.headline: text pixel best F1 0.008322; target-level F1 remains 0.0
limitations: do not include as positive claim

claim_evidence_map.scope: expected-json/dev and secondary smoke replay paths
claim_evidence_map.headline: dev relation F1 0.926172->1.000000; real_v3 smoke 0.918303->1.000000

must_run_before_sci2_submission.why: Current P100/P101 model-output coverage is only 74 rows, not full 992-row public raster locked set.
SCI2 requires comparison against credible detector/OCR/scene-graph baselines and no-MoE variants.
P095 relation gains are expected-json/oracle replay, not true raster model-output robustness.
Current AI draft annotations are not ground truth.

must_run_before_sci2_submission.experiment: Dedicated symbol/OCR branch or documented failure boundary
must_run_before_sci2_submission.why: Image-only symbol/text remain weak; either improve them or explicitly scope them out.

figure_table_plan.title: Audit-gated MoE pipeline and runtime contract
Policy handoff and opt-in decision flow
Failure taxonomy examples from real-raster pilot

target_journal_positioning.best_fit_profile: Computer vision / CAD / engineering informatics journal that accepts method + audit/evaluation framework papers.
target_journal_positioning.avoid_claiming: Do not market as solved full industrial floorplan parser yet.
target_journal_positioning.submission_gate: Only consider SCI2 submission after full locked evaluation, baselines, and reviewed real-raster evidence are added.

parallel_model_backlog: Train/evaluate dedicated symbol detector branch for image-only v15 or full public-raster coverage.
Add OCR/text branch for raster text targets.
Validate contains relation on true model-output raster predictions.
Human-review real-scene pilot annotations before any real drawing metric claim.
